description_long: This is a vintage biplane with a green fuselage and dual blue wings, each adorned with roundel insignias. The aircraft features a wooden propeller at the front, supported by a fixed undercarriage with two main wheels and a tail skid. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a red headrest visible. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all painted in matching green and blue tones. The structure is reinforced with struts and wires typical of early 20th-century military aircraft, giving it a classic, robust appearance.
description: A vintage green and blue biplane with dual wings, open cockpit, and wooden propeller, featuring roundel insignias and a fixed undercarriage.
description_view_0: The left side of the biplane shows the dual stacked wings, green fuselage, and roundel insignias on the wings, with the tail and propeller partially visible.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the symmetrical layout of the wings and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the stacked wings, roundel insignias, and the green fuselage, with the propeller and cockpit visible at the front.
description_view_3: The front view showcases the wooden propeller, open cockpit behind the upper wing, and the symmetrical biplane wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, forward-mounted on the fuselage.
